channel.title: GitHub Rust Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: nushell/nushell
item.description: A new type of shell

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: Yet another remote desktop software

item.title: BurntSushi/ripgrep
item.description: ripgrep recursively searches directories for a regex pattern while respecting your gitignore

item.title: rust-analyzer/rust-analyzer
item.description: A Rust compiler front-end for IDEs

item.title: gfx-rs/wgpu
item.description: Safe and portable GPU abstraction in Rust, implementing WebGPU API.

item.title: uutils/coreutils
item.description: Cross-platform Rust rewrite of the GNU coreutils

item.title: firecracker-microvm/firecracker
item.description: Secure and fast microVMs for serverless computing.

item.title: timberio/vector
item.description: A high-performance, highly reliable, observability data pipeline.

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: wasmerio/wasmer
item.description: 🚀 The leading WebAssembly Runtime supporting WASI and Emscripten

item.title: 996icu/996.ICU
item.description: Repo for counting stars and contributing. Press F to pay respect to glorious developers.

item.title: meilisearch/MeiliSearch
item.description: Powerful, fast, and an easy to use search engine

item.title: ruffle-rs/ruffle
item.description: A Flash Player emulator written in Rust

item.title: denoland/deno
item.description: A secure JavaScript and TypeScript runtime

item.title: Geal/nom
item.description: Rust parser combinator framework

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: rust-lang/rust
item.description: Empowering everyone to build reliable and efficient software.

item.title: SergioBenitez/Rocket
item.description: A web framework for Rust.

item.title: ogham/exa
item.description: A modern replacement for ‘ls’.

item.title: actix/actix-web
item.description: Actix Web is a powerful, pragmatic, and extremely fast web framework for Rust.

item.title: metaplex-foundation/metaplex
item.description: The Metaplex protocol

item.title: bottlerocket-os/bottlerocket
item.description: An operating system designed for hosting containers

item.title: ClementTsang/bottom
item.description: Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

item.title: Canop/broot
item.description: A new way to see and navigate directory trees : https://dystroy.org/broot
